title: auth-svc unable to connect to Redis — all token validations failing
description:
Starting 2022-07-04 ~10:31 UTC, auth-svc is returning 503 on all token validation requests.
Logs show: 'Unable to connect to Redis: redis-prod-eu.internal:6379 — Connection refused'.

Root cause appears to be an infrastructure config change (PR-3301) that changed REDIS_HOST to redis-prod-eu.internal. DNS for this host is not resolvable from the production k8s cluster — the EU Redis cluster migration was not fully provisioned.

title: Reschedule EU Redis migration with proper DNS pre-provisioning
description:
The 2022-07-04 EU Redis migration (PR-3301) failed because the DNS record for redis-prod-eu.internal was not propagated to the prod k8s cluster before the config change was deployed.

Reschedule with:
1. DNS record created and verified resolvable from prod cluster BEFORE helm values change
2. Staged rollout: one pod at a time with health check validation
3. Rollback plan documented and tested

New target: 2022-07-11 during low-traffic window.
